title: iberis carnosa subsp. hegelmaieri
intro: Iberis carnosa subsp. hegelmaieri, also known as Dwarf Cress or Alpine Rockcress, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat respiratory issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Iberis carnosa subsp. hegelmaieri include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used externally as a compress or poultice to treat skin irritations.
